arts.ttl: Arsenal face Barcelona competition for potential €50million attacker transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal may reportedly not be the only club considering the transfer of €50million-rated Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran, according to journalist Ekrem Konur. Writing on X, formerly Twitter, Konur explained that Barcelona are now also showing an interest in the Colombia international as they look at possible long-term replacements for veteran front-man Robert Lewandowski. arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Aston Villa star's representatives 'contacted' by Deco
arts.sum: Aston Villa star Jhon Duran reportedly becomes a transfer target for a European giant on the back of his sparkling form at the start of 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny accepts Barcelona offer – talks with Juventus underway
arts.sum: Barcelona look well on their way to recruiting a new goalkeeper to compensate for the absence of Marc-Andre ter Stegen, for what is likely to be the rest of the season. The Polish goalkeeper retired last month, but looks to be keen on a return to the game. arts.ttl: ‘If nothing goes wrong’ – Barcelona will get deal done for goalkeeper imminently
arts.sum: Barcelona have decided that Wojciech Szczesny is their preferred goalkeeper to come in for the injured Marc-Andre ter Stegen, with the Polish shot-stopper willing to come out of retirement to sign for the Catalan giants. However they have yet to reach an agreement. arts.ttl: Barcelona have long-term Marc-Andre ter Stegen in mind
arts.sum: Barcelona look as if they will sign an experienced shot-stopper to replace injured captain Marc-Andre ter Stegen, after he was ruled out for most if not all of this season. It has raised question marks over the German’s long-term future at the club. arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Getafe: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: La Liga leaders Barcelona are in midweek action as they take on a struggling Getafe side in Catalonia on Wednesday night. The German has been forced to deal with an ever-growing injury list, but he's nonetheless overseen six victories from six to start the new La Liga season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'make contact' with retired goalkeeper after Marc-Andre ter Stegen injury
arts.sum: Barcelona are reported to be in talks with former Juventus goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny as they consider options to replace Marc-Andre ter Stegen. Claudio Bravo, who shared duties with Ter Stegen for two years and only recently retired after leaving Real Betis, has offered his services to his former club .
